transcription.text: We started Warby Parker in 2010 to change the way people buy glasses. Our big idea was actually quite simple. Offer high-quality eyewear in the most seamless way possible, and make it affordable. We started with a free home try-on. Then we built easy-to-shop stores that offer eye exams. And today, we have apps that let you try on frames and renew your prescription from home. Whether it's eyeglasses, sunglasses, or contacts, we've got your eyes covered. For more information, visit www.fema.gov
